title: WokeDF
description: Allows viewing DF players set pronouns directly from the tab list
body:
A unofficial clientside mod for the DiamondFire minecraft server allowing the ability to view other players pronouns and join dates without manually checking the players respective profile.

Automatically checks and caches player information for display on the player list, ingame chat and player nameplates

This mod will only provide any utility on DiamondFire.
